name: A Faire Reward
text: Instead of a minion, Triple Rewards Discover a Tier 1 Darkmoon Prize. (Improves in 4 turns!)

name: All Bottled Up
text: At the start of each turn, get a Portal in a Bottle.

name: Amicable Amendment
text: The Cost of your Buddy Button is 50% higher, but reduces by (1) after you buy a card.

name: Anomalous Bribe
text: After you sell a minion, give its stats to a minion in the Tavern.

name: Anomalous Evidence
text: At the start of each turn, choose from 2 new Quest Rewards. (Unlocks on Turn 4.)

name: Anomalous Twin
text: Start of Combat: Summon a copy of your highest-Health minion.

name: Anomalous Wisdomball
text: You occasionally get helpful Refreshes! (Unlocks on Turn 5.)

name: Audience's Choice
text: [x]At the start of each turn, one player chooses a card for ALL players to get at end of turn.

name: Big League
text: Only Tavern Tiers 3, 4, 5, and 6 exist. Start with 10 extra Armor.

name: Blessed or Blighted
text: [x]Start of Combat: Give your left-most minion Divine Shield and your right-most minion Reborn.

name: Blood of Sargeras
text: [x]At the start of your turn, set your hero's Health to 12.

name: Bring Home the Bacon
text: [x]Start with two upgrading 'Piggy Banks'. Break them open to gain Gold!

name: Bring in the Buddies
text: [x]Buddies are in the Tavern.

name: Buddies
text: Buddies are in this game!

name: Colorful Camaraderie
text: [x]Buddies have all minion types.

name: Continuing Education
text: [x]At the start of each turn, get an Evolving Scroll. Each turn, it transforms into a Tavern spell from a Tier higher.

name: Cosmic Duality
text: At the start of the game, Discover a second Hero Power.

name: Curse of Aggramar
text: [x]Start at 5 Health and 5 Gold. Your hero can only take 1 damage at a time.

name: Darkmoon Prizes
text: Darkmoon Prizes are in this game!

name: Deep Blue Sooner
text: [x]At the start of your turn, get 2 temporary Deep Blues. They give a minion more stats each time!

name: Denathrius' Anima Reserves
text: [x]Quests and Rewards are in this game. All heroes are Sire Denathrius.

name: Double Header
text: The first time you buy a card each turn, get an extra copy of it.

name: Echoes of Argus
text: Your Battlecries and Deathrattles trigger an extra time.

name: Eleventh Hour
text: [x]The first time your hero takes fatal damage in combat, prevent it and gain 11 Gold next turn instead.

name: Elven Elite
text: The Tavern only offers cards of your Tier.

name: Emergency Landing
text: Twice per turn, you can remove all copies of a minion in the Tavern from your pool.

name: Everything's on Fire!
text: [x]At the start of the game, take 25 damage. After another hero dies, regain 5 Health.

name: Factory Line
text: At the end of every 2 turns, get a plain copy of your left-most minion. (2 turns left!)

name: False Idols
text: [x]You only need 2 copies of a minion to make it Golden. Instead of a Triple Reward, get a Gold Coin.

name: Feline Fortune
text: [x]After another hero dies, Discover a minion from their warband. It keeps enchantments.

name: Finicky Hourglass
text: Start at Tavern Tier 2.

name: Gladiator's Spoils
text: [x]After you win a combat, Discover a minion of your Tier. Otherwise, get a random one of a Tier lower.

name: Golden Arrow
text: [x]Every 3 turns, get a Golden Arrow. (3 turns left!)

name: Golden Friendship
text: Once per game, you can Goldenize and Pass a minion.

name: Golganneth's Tempest
text: [x]Minions cost 2 Gold. You cannot Refresh the Tavern. It Refreshes itself after you buy a card.

name: Grapnel of the Titans
text: The first minion you buy each turn is free.

name: Greater Pouches
text: On Turns 8 and 9, buy a Greater Trinket. There are no Lesser Trinkets in this game.

name: How to Even??
text: [x]Only Tavern Tiers 2, 4, and 6 exist. Triple Rewards Discover a minion of your Tier.

name: Impressive Foresight
text: Buy your Lesser Trinket on Turn 5, and your Greater Trinket on Turn 8.

name: Incubation Mutation
text: Minions with no type have all minion types.

name: Instant Warband
text: Start with 3 different Tier 2 minions in hand.

name: Lay of the Land
text: The Tavern offers 1 extra Tavern spell after each Refresh.

name: Lesser Pouches
text: On Turns 6 and 7, buy a Lesser Trinket. There are no Greater Trinkets in this game.

name: Light the Way
text: After you Refresh two times, gain 1 Gold next turn. (

name: Line in the Sand
text: Start with a Sandy in play.

name: Little League
text: Only Tavern Tiers 1, 2, 3, and 4 exist.

name: Magic Shop
text: Spell Tickets are in the Tavern! Get 3 to Discover a Tavern spell of your Tier. (

name: Marin's Treasure Box
text: [x]Trinkets are in this game. All heroes are Marin the Manager.

name: Match Fixing
text: [x]Guess which player will win your next combat. If you're correct, get 3 Gold Coins.

name: Mimiron's Clockwork Stadium
text: [x]You cannot upgrade the Tavern with Gold. It upgrades itself every 2 turns. (2 turns left!)

name: Money Match
text: Start at 10 Gold.

name: Mystical Blossom
text: At the start of each turn, Discover a Tavern spell. (Unlocks on Turn 3.)

name: Nguyen's Shifting Disks
text: All heroes are Master Nguyen.

name: No Face, No Case
text: [x]Every 4 turns, get a Faceless Manipulator. (4 turns left!)

name: No Place Like Holmes
text: Each turn, look at 2 minions. Guess which one your next opponent had last combat for a Coin.

name: Oops, All Beasts!
text: Only Beasts are in the Tavern.

name: Oops, All Demons!
text: Only Demons are in the Tavern.

name: Oops, All Dragons!
text: Only Dragons are in the Tavern.

name: Oops, All EVIL!
text: Only evil 92 are in the Tavern.

name: Oops, All Elementals!
text: Only Elementals are in the Tavern.

name: Oops, All Mechs!
text: Only Mechs are in the Tavern.

name: Oops, All Murlocs!
text: Only Murlocs are in the Tavern.

name: Oops, All Naga!
text: Only Naga are in the Tavern.

name: Oops, All Pirates!
text: [x]Only Pirates are in the Tavern. 'Cap'n Hoggarr' is in the minion pool.

name: Oops, All Quilboar!
text: Only Quilboar are in the Tavern.

name: Oops, All Undead!
text: Only Undead are in the Tavern.

name: Overseer's Orb
text: [x]After you upgrade the Tavern, Refresh it with minions of your most common type.

name: Packed Stands
text: The Tavern always has 7 cards.

name: Partner in Crime
text: [x]You have no Buddy Button. On turn 4, choose a Quest to get your Golden Buddy.

name: Path of the Treasure-Seeker
text: After you Refresh 5 times, find the Golden Monkey! (

name: Perfected Alchemy
text: Start with a Goldenizer.

name: Planar Alignment
text: At the start of each turn, get a random minion of your most common type. (Unlocks on Turn 2.)

name: Pooled Resources
text: You can send your Gold to your teammate.

name: Prudence of Amitus
text: [x]Unspent Gold carries over to your next turn. If you saved at least 5, gain 1 extra.

name: Quests
text: Quests and Rewards are in this game!

name: Reckless Enhancement
text: [x]Minions in the Tavern each randomly gain Taunt, Windfury, Divine Shield, or Reborn.

name: Rising Current
text: [x]After you upgrade the Tavern, Discover a Tier 1 Tavern spell. (Improves in 2 turns!)

name: Scout's Honor
text: Start with a Golden Patient Scout in play.

name: Secrets of Norgannon
text: Tavern Tier 7 exists. Start with 10 extra Armor.

name: Sin'dorei Mirror
text: [x]After you buy your first Tavern spell each turn, get an extra copy of it. (Unlocks on Turn 5.)

name: Spirit of Friendship
text: After you press your Buddy Button, also Discover a Buddy.

name: Summoning Pact
text: [x]After you upgrade the Tavern, reduce the cost of your next Buddy by (2).

name: Summoning of Champions
text: [x]At the start of the game, all players Discover a Tier 6 minion from the same choices.

name: Tavern Special
text: [x]All minion types are in the Tavern. It always has 7 cards.

name: Temperance of Aman'Thul
text: Start at Tavern Tier 3 with 9 Gold. All cards in your first shop are Tier 3.

name: The Golden Arena
text: ALL minions are Golden, but you do not get Triple Rewards.

name: The Yogg-iseum
text: At the start of each turn, spin the SAME Wheel of Yogg-Saron.

name: Third Nature
text: [x]You can press your Buddy Button a 3rd time for a Golden Buddy. It costs half.

name: Treasure Hoard
text: [x]On Turn 6, Discover a Golden Tier 4 minion. (5 turns left!)

name: Treasure Hoard
text: [x]On Turn 7, Discover a Golden Tier 5 minion. (6 turns left!)

name: Treasure Hoard
text: [x]On Turn 8, Discover a Golden Tier 6 minion. (7 turns left!)

name: Treasure Hoard
text: [x]On Turn 5, Discover a Golden Tier 3 minion. (4 turns left!)

name: Treasure Hoard
text: [x]On Turn 9, Discover a Golden Tier 7 minion. (8 turns left!)

name: Uncompensated Upset
text: [x]Start at 1 Gold. Minions cost (1) but sell for (0). Upgrading the Tavern costs (2) less.

name: Up-Prizing
text: [x]After you upgrade the Tavern, Discover a Tier 1 Darkmoon Prize. (Improves in 3 turns!)

name: Valuation Inflation
text: Tavern Tier 1 does not exist. Minions cost Gold equal to their Tier.

name: What Are the Odds?
text: [x]Only Tavern Tiers 1, 3, and 5 exist. Triple Rewards Discover a minion of your Tier.
